steps.title: Check current ClickHouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your ClickHouse version:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
UDF support requires ClickHouse 21.10+ for SQL UDFs.

steps.title: Review UDF support
steps.description:
ClickHouse supports User Defined Functions in two forms:
1. **SQL UDFs** - Lambda-based functions defined in SQL
2. **Executable UDFs** - External programs that process data

steps.title: Create a UDF
steps.description:
Create a SQL-based UDF:
```sql
CREATE FUNCTION linear_equation AS (x, k, b) -> k * x + b;

SELECT linear_equation(2, 3, 4);
```

For executable UDFs, configure in `*_function.xml`:
```xml
<functions>
    <function>
        <type>executable</type>
        <name>my_udf</name>
        <return_type>String</return_type>
        <argument><type>String</type></argument>
        <format>TabSeparated</format>
        <command>my_script.sh</command>
    </function>
</functions>
```

steps.title: Verify UDF works

resolution.summary: ClickHouse added User Defined Function (UDF) support, including SQL-based lambda functions and executable UDFs.

prerequisites.description: A working ClickHouse installation (21.10+ for SQL UDFs).
